t: Station Schema — lines, lineEvents, extend sessions + trackArtifacts

adds.lines: id(uuid), wheelId(text), label(text), status(active/archived/merged), createdAt, updatedAt
adds.lineEvents: id(uuid), lineId(FK), type(fork/merge/snapshot), forkId(uuid?), sourceSessionId, targetSessionId, payload(jsonb), createdAt

extends.sessions: lineId(FK→lines), forkId(uuid?), codename(text), promptVersion(text), governanceMode(text?), ingestSource(live/pasted/uploaded)

_behavior_directive.what_this_is: A DB schema work item. TRACK and execute first — all other station tasks are blocked on this.
_behavior_directive.what_this_is_NOT: An instruction to execute automatically. Do not run migrations without user confirmation. Check existing schema before adding columns.
_behavior_directive.processing_agent: developer runs db:push after schema file is updated
_behavior_directive.expected_outcome: lines and lineEvents tables exist in Supabase; sessions and trackArtifacts have new columns
